content.rendered:
Turn Every Cabana Into a Revenue Engine — $0 Upfront

The LounGenie™ smart cabana system combines QR ordering, a waterproof safe, solar-powered USB charging, and a removable ice bucket into one commercial-grade unit. Hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, and surf parks see measurable lifts in food and beverage revenue — starting Day 1, with zero capital outlay. We install it. We maintain it. You keep the revenue.

Trusted by Global Hospitality Leaders

Your Pool Deck Is Losing Revenue Right Now

Every pool deck loses revenue the same three ways. Guests leave to charge phones. They skip food orders because no server is nearby. They cut their stay short because they don’t trust leaving valuables on a lounge chair.

Every hour a guest walks off the deck is a missed food and beverage opportunity. Across a full season of cabanas and premium seating areas, those missed orders add up to tens of thousands in lost income — money that never reaches your bottom line.

LounGenie solves all three problems at the guest’s seat.

One System. Every Venue Type.

The LounGenie™ smart cabana system serves hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, surf parks, country clubs, and municipal aquatic centers. Whether you operate 10 cabanas or 500 premium seating areas — daybeds, clamshells, VIP loungers, and reserved deck chairs — the modular design scales without additional infrastructure. Each unit is weather-rated for year-round outdoor use in any climate, on land or at sea. Every unit is fully customizable — match your property’s colors, branding, and aesthetic. Logos and branded advertising are also available.

Hotel

Resort

Waterparks

Cruise Line

Surf Park

4 Ways the LounGenie™ Smart Cabana System Elevates the Guest Experience

ORDER: QR Ordering & Service Call Button

Guests scan a QR code to order food and drinks — the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. A built-in service call button alerts staff via a touchscreen monitor showing exactly which cabana needs attention. No app download. No POS integration. No added labor. Service call button on Service+ and 2.0. QR ordering on 2.0.

STASH: Waterproof Safe

A waterproof safe with a waterproof keypad lets guests lock phones, wallets, and room keys inside the cabana. When guests feel secure, they swim, relax, and stay on the deck far longer. Properties consistently report that STASH is the single feature guests mention most in reviews.

CHARGE: Solar-Powered USB Charging

Solar panels power the USB charging ports from sunrise to sunset — no wiring, no permits, no electricity cost. When guests can charge poolside, they stop leaving the pool area. And when they stay, they order.

CHILL: Removable Ice Bucket

A removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold at the seat for hours. Cold drinks within arm's reach encourage high-margin repeat beverage orders throughout the afternoon — without a server needing to check in.

Every LounGenie™ unit is designed for universal accessibility — guests of all ages and mobility levels can reach every feature from a standard lounge chair or wheelchair.

Explore every feature of the poolside amenity unit →

What Happens When a Guest Sits Down

Here is what happens when a guest sits down:

  • 1. They lock their phone, wallet, and room key in the built-in waterproof safe.
  • 2. Next, they plug a device into the solar-powered USB charging port.​
  • 3. Then they scan a QR code or press the service call button to order food and drinks — the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. (QR ordering on 2.0, service call button on Service+ and 2.0.)
  • 4. Finally, their beverages stay cold in the removable ice bucket at arm's reach.

The guest stays longer. They order more. Your servers only move when someone is ready to spend. Every unit is solar-powered, completely modular, and deploys in minutes — no electrical trenching, no permits, no downtime.

See how it works →

We Install It. We Maintain It. You Keep the Revenue.

The LounGenie™ operates on a revenue-share model — zero upfront cost, zero risk. We provide the hardware, fly to your property for full installation, and handle all ongoing maintenance and service. You generate incremental F&B and cabana rental revenue from Day 1. We share in the upside. That’s it.

Meet the team behind LounGenie →

Why Properties Make More Money With LounGenie

LounGenie drives revenue through two behavioral shifts:

Guests stay longer.

When valuables are locked in the waterproof safe and devices are charging, guests stop leaving the deck. Longer stays mean more ordering windows — more drinks, more food, more spend per visit.

Ordering becomes Instant.

A QR code or service call button removes the gap between "I want a drink" and "I placed an order." No flagging servers. No missed sales. No friction.

The result: more orders per guest, per visit, per season — at zero upfront cost to your property.

What Hospitality Partners Say About Our Smart Cabana System

“We’ve exceeded our goals since implementing the LounGenie. The product’s design and revenue share partnership have been key to our success. We look forward to working with PoolSafe, Inc. for many years to come.”

Raymond Weissert
General Manager,
The Grove Waterpark and Resort

“The LounGenie has enhanced our guest experience with secure storage, charging ports, and the F&B call button. Our guests love the convenience, and we’ve recommended the LounGenie to others because of the exceptional service.”

Kamiya Woodard
Director of Guest Experience, Orlando World Center Marriott

“The addition of the LounGenie to our cabanas took the experience to the next level. Our guests love the ease of use, and the units have been a big hit. We look forward to continued success with the LounGenie.”

Louis R. Cirigliano, Jr. General Manager,
Casino Pier and Breakwater Beach

Standard Cabana vs. LounGenie™-Equipped Cabana

Guest Experience Standard Cabana LounGenie™-Equipped Cabana
Valuables Guest worries or leaves early Locked in a waterproof safe
Phone Charging Guest leaves the deck Solar-powered USB charging at the seat
Ordering Food & Drinks Flag down a server or walk to the bar Call button alerts staff (Service+) · QR scan prints order on PoolSafe printer (2.0)
Cold Beverages Drinks warm up quickly Removable ice bucket keeps drinks cold for hours
Revenue per Cabana Minimal — passive furniture Incremental F&B captured throughout the day
Upfront Cost to Property N/A $0 — revenue share model
Maintenance Property handles repairs PoolSafe handles installation, maintenance, and service

Three Tiers. One Goal: More Revenue.

LounGenie™ Classic — Essential Comfort and Security​

Best for properties that want to upgrade basic poolside amenities quickly.

  • STASH: Waterproof safe with waterproof keypad
  • CHARGE: Solar-powered USB port
  • CHILL: Removable ice bucket

LounGenie™ Service+ — Eliminate Dead Runs​

Everything in Classic, plus a dedicated service call button that sends alerts to a staff touchscreen monitor. Your team only moves when a guest needs attention.

  • Includes all Classic features plus a service call button and staff touchscreen monitor.

LounGenie™ 2.0 — Maximum Revenue, Full QR Ordering​

Our flagship smart cabana system turns every chair into an ordering station.

  • Everything in Service+, plus full QR ordering — guests scan to order and it prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe.
  • Includes service call button and staff touchscreen monitor.
  • Eliminates missed orders and wait time.
  • Highest revenue impact of any LounGenie™ configuration.
  • All four features — STASH, CHARGE, CHILL, ORDER — in one unit.

Watch the LounGenie™ in Action

See how our smart cabana system transforms the poolside experience for guests and staff in under 90 seconds.

Frequently Asked Questions About Smart Cabana Systems

What is a smart cabana system?

A smart cabana system is an all-in-one poolside amenity unit that combines guest security, device charging, beverage cooling, and food ordering into a single piece of furniture. The LounGenie™ is the leading smart cabana system in the hospitality industry.

How much does a smart cabana system cost?

The LounGenie™ requires $0 upfront. It operates on a revenue-share model, so your property generates new income from Day 1 without any capital outlay.

Do smart cabanas need electrical wiring?

No. The LounGenie™ is completely solar-powered. There is no electrical trenching, no permits, and no ongoing energy cost. 

How do guests order food from a cabana?

Guests can scan a QR code to place a food and beverage order — the order prints on a dedicated printer provided by PoolSafe. No app download needed. Guests can also press a built-in service call button, which sends an alert to a staff touchscreen monitor showing exactly which cabana needs attention. QR ordering is available on LounGenie 2.0. The service call button is available on Service+ and 2.0.

How durable are the units?

Every LounGenie™ unit is built with UV-resistant, weather-rated, corrosion-resistant aluminum and commercial-grade construction.

What about guest adoption?

There is no app to download. Guests scan a QR code with their phone camera or press a physical button. The experience is intuitive from the first use — no instructions, no learning curve.

What about maintenance?

Our team handles full on-site installation and all ongoing maintenance and service.

Ready to Turn Your Pool Deck Into a Profit Center?

Getting started takes three steps:

  • 1. We assess your property layout, cabana count, and premium seating areas.
  • 2. We handle full on-site installation — no wiring, no permits, no downtime.
  • 3. You earn new F&B revenue starting Day 1.

Join the premier hotels, resorts, waterparks, cruise lines, and surf parks already partnering with LounGenie™ to capture revenue that traditional furniture leaves on the table.

Get Your Free Revenue Projection →
See all LounGenie features →
